text:
Spain, country in southwestern Europe with territories in Africa, also known as ESP, ES, Kingdom of Spain. Attributes include: 
- inception: "1715 (identity of subject in context: Spanish House of Bourbon ; latest date: 1715 ; has cause: Nueva Planta decrees, Treaty of Baden)",
 "19 Mar 1812 (instance of: Spanish Constitution of 1812 ; end time: 4 May 1814)",
 "9 Dec 1931 (instance of: Spanish Constitution of 1931 ; basic form of government: republic ; time period: Second Spanish Republic ; end time: 1 Apr 1939)",
 "29 Dec 1978 (instance of: constitution of Spain ; statement is subject of: Spanish transition to democracy)",
 "24 Mar 1516 (basic form of government: monarchy)"
- located in time zone: "UTC+01:00 (valid in period: standard time ; excluding: Canary Islands ; statement is subject of: Central European Time)",
 "UTC+02:00 (valid in period: daylight saving time ; excluding: Canary Islands ; statement is subject of: Central European Summer Time)",
 "UTC±00:00 (applies to part: Canary Islands ; valid in period: standard time ; statement is subject of: Western European Time)",
 "UTC+01:00 (applies to part: Canary Islands ; valid in period: daylight saving time ; statement is subject of: Western European Summer Time)"
- history of topic: "history of Spain"
- replaces: "Hispanic Monarchy (point in time: 1716)",
 "Crown of Aragon (point in time: 1715)",
 "Spanish Empire",
 "Kingdom of Aragon",
 "First Spanish Republic"

 "Alboran Sea (applies to part: peninsular Spain, Ceuta, Melilla, plazas de soberanía ; part of: Mediterranean Sea)"
- capital: "Madrid"
- coat of arms: "coat of arms of Kingdom of Spain"
